top_signals.title: Russia Hikes June Subsidies to Refiners as Fuel Shortages Bite
top_signals.summary: Russia’s subsidy payouts to oil refiners that supply domestic markets jumped more than six-fold in June from a year earlier, as Moscow sought to avoid shortages by keeping more fuel at home.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Pubs to Get Short-Term World Cup Boost
top_signals.summary: UK pubs will be allowed to stay open for Monday’s early morning match, but the overall benefit of the World Cup will likely be short-lived. Bloomberg's Sam Unsed discusses on "The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: StanChart joins ESMA's first MiCA register update since deadline
top_signals.summary: ESMA publishes its first post-deadline MiCA register update, adding 37 crypto-asset service providers, including Standard Chartered and FalconX.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
